system.description: Your corrupted signature is broadcasting at full intensity. Until the start of your next turn: enhancement-reading systems register you as whichever caste or identity you choose, any creature that attempts to lock a control effect on you must overcome your corruption (Stagger, Root, Taunt directed at you each have a 50% chance to fail — narrative resolution, not dice), and one ally within reach gains Guard 4 from the resonant noise covering their signature.
